= w:en:User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/SkinSwitcher =
{{ombox
 |small=yes
 |type=content
 |text=This is the documentation page for the [[User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/SkinSwitcher.js]] user script, which was forked from [[User:Eizen/SkinSwitcher.js]].}}

{{infobox Wikipedia user script
 |name      = SkinSwitcher
 |desc      = Allows for easy switching between MediaWiki's default skins
 |author    = [[User:Eizen|Eizen]] <br/> [[User:ClaudineChionh|ClaudineChionh]]
 |updated   = {{Start date and age|2026|02|28}}
 |status    = Beta
 |version   = 0.3.0
 |source    = [[User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/SkinSwitcher.js]]
 |skins     = {{Vector 2022|Vector 2010|Timeless|Minerva|MonoBook|ApiOutput}}
}}

'''SkinSwitcher''' is a [[JavaScript]] [[Wikipedia:User scripts|user script]] that allows users to view a given page in MediaWiki's default skins. {{As of|2021|11|06}}, these were Vector (2010), Timeless, MonoBook, and ApiOutput.

An options menu/toolbox/toolbar is provided in each skin to make skin switching convenient and easy. For Vector (2022 and 2010), Timeless, and MonoBook, a toolbox is provided below "Tools" on the left-hand side of the screen, and for Minerva and ApiOutput, an experimental toolbar is provided across the top of the {{mono|body}} of the page.
